name: two-shot-close
prompt: Wide two-shot. Silver-haired woman RIGHT facing LEFT, dark-haired young man LEFT facing RIGHT. Space between them nearly gone — arms length or less. Heat and cold visible colliding where they almost touch. She should freeze him. She doesn't. Steam and mist between them. Storage room dim around them. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: rei-lips-name
prompt: Extreme close-up on lips. Pale lips forming words, frost melting on breath. Surrender in the shape. Whisper. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-touch-jaw
prompt: Close-up. Male fingers with burn scars finally making contact with pale jaw. Heat blooming where skin touches skin. First contact. Electric. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

sfx.description: soft warm breath, gentle skin contact, faint sizzle of heat meeting cold
